parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ collection: $json.collection, text: $json.text, title: 'Mattermost message', post_id: $json.post_id, metadata: { source_type: 'mattermost_text', author: $json.user_name, mattermost_channel_id: $json.channel_id, mattermost_channel_name: $json.channel_name, mattermost_post_id: $json.post_id } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ $json.ok === false ? { ok: false, message: 'RAG ingest failed or no text was extracted.' } : { ok: true, message: 'Knowledge accepted for RAG ingest.' } }}
={{ { ok: true, ignored: true, message: $json.reason || 'Channel ignored.' } }}
